text: Hi, I am interested in buying your tech channel. Is the price negotiable?
Hello! The price is slightly negotiable, but I have already received several offers near the buyout price.
I see. If I buy it at the full buyout price, can we initiate escrow transfer today?
Yes, absolutely! The credentials, verification logs, and associated email are all prepared for immediate transfer.
Hey Sophia! I love the aesthetics of your travel page. What is the active reach per post?
Hi! Organic post reach averages around 15k to 20k impressions, with reels going up to 100k.
